subject: Instruction
body:
Optimally resolve all blockers and gaps that exist in the current, ground
truth, TDD verified system state vs the Nexus plan.
Reverse engineer as a Senior Systems architect goal ( sans SOVEREIGN
walk-through vs tdd verified ground truth only of current system state.
Optimally resolve all gaps and all blockers.
Continue until system state = fully deployed, fully TDD verified in ground
truth.
You must not rely on completion/passes/done/etc in any docs.
Do not stop until you fully verify TDD actual system state meets and/or
exceeds goal.
Begin
